# PostCSS

<img align="right" width="95" height="95"
     alt="PhilosopherжѕЦТфџ stone, logo of PostCSS"
     src="https://postcss.org/logo.svg">

PostCSS is a tool for transforming styles with JS plugins.
These plugins can lint your CSS, supportУЂйvariablesУЂйandУЂйmixins,
transpileУЂйfutureУЂйCSSУЂйsyntax, inlineУЂйimages, andУЂйmore.

PostCSS is used by industry leaders including Wikipedia, Twitter, Alibaba,
and JetBrains. TheУЂй[Autoprefixer] and [Stylelint]УЂйPostCSS pluginsУЂйare someУЂйofУЂйtheУЂйmost popular CSS tools.
